first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate as overqualified for an entry-level role and note the mismatch in primary language expertise (non-Java) versus the job requirements. The minor variations in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not introduce any new concepts or change the core assessment of the candidate.
